posts.author: Coltrane (LC)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey guys!
I’m currently working on a project that requires a shopify - monday connection to receive purchase notifications (something I´ve done for other clients before), but I can’t find the integration anymore and only seem to be able to use priced alternatives (Zapier, Integromat).

Has this integration been removed? If so, what alternatives do you normally use?

Thanks!
